Tests the Animal constructor function for properties like canWalk and canFly based on the name.

# Purpose
This code defines a simple constructor function [`Animal`](<#02-007Animal>) that initializes objects with a `name` property and a `canWalk` property set to `true`. If the `name` is "bird", the `canFly` property is also set to `true`. The code then creates two instances of [`Animal`](<#02-007Animal>): one with the name "animal" and another with the name "bird". It uses assertions to verify that both instances have the `canWalk` property set to `true`, and that only the "bird" instance has the `canFly` property set to `true`. This code provides narrow functionality, focusing on the creation and validation of [`Animal`](<#02-007Animal>) objects with specific properties.
# Global Variables

---
### animal
- **Type**: ``Animal``
- **Description**: An instance of the `Animal` class with the name property set to 'animal'. It has the `canWalk` property set to true and does not have the `canFly` property.
- **Use**: Used to represent an animal that can walk but cannot fly.


---
### bird
- **Type**: ``Animal``
- **Description**: Represents an instance of the `Animal` class with the name 'bird'. The `bird` variable is initialized with properties `name`, `canWalk`, and `canFly` set to 'bird', `true`, and `true` respectively.
- **Use**: Used to create an `Animal` object that can walk and fly, specifically representing a bird.


# Functions

---
### Animal<!-- {{#callable:pebble-firmware/src/fw/vendor/jerryscript/tests/jerry-test-suite/11/11.02/11.02.02/11.02.02-007.Animal}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../../../../../../src/fw/vendor/jerryscript/tests/jerry-test-suite/11/11.02/11.02.02/11.02.02-007.js#L15>)

Represents an animal with properties indicating its ability to walk and, if applicable, fly.
- **Inputs**:
    - `name`: The name of the animal, which determines its properties.
- **Control Flow**:
    - Assigns the input `name` to the `name` property of the object.
    - Sets the `canWalk` property to `true` for all instances.
    - Checks if the `name` is 'bird'; if true, sets the `canFly` property to `true`.
- **Output**: An object with properties `name`, `canWalk`, and optionally `canFly`.
